profile.emailDescription: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if you need to update your email address.

user.title: Account Settings
user.activeSessionsDescription: Manage your active sessions and devices.
user.revokeSessionDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke this session? You will be logged out from this device.
user.revokeAllSessionsDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke all sessions? You will be logged out from all devices except this one.
user.verificationEmailSent: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

support.title: Contact Support
support.description: Describe your issue or question. We'll get back to you as soon as we can.
support.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. We'll be in touch soon.

org.title: Organization Settings
org.description: Manage your organization settings and preferences
org.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this organization? This action cannot be undone.
org.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this organization? It will be hidden from your list. Contact support to restore it later. If not restored within 30 days, it will be permanently deleted.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.scheduledDowngradeMessage: You'll switch to {{plan}} on {{date}}. You keep your current plan until then.
subscription.noSubscriptionMessage: You don't have a subscription yet. Choose a plan to get started.
subscription.noActiveSubscription: You don't have an active subscription. Choose a plan and update your billing details to continue.
subscription.upsellDescription: Upgrade your plan or get a custom quote. Contact your customer success agent to change your subscription.
subscription.contactCsNote: Contact your customer success agent for changes to your subscription.
subscription.manageNote: Upgrade or change your plan using the options below.
subscription.switchToMonthlyOn: You'll switch to monthly billing on {{date}}
subscription.switchToMonthlyScheduled: Your billing will switch to monthly at the end of your current period.
subscription.planChangeScheduled: Your plan change is scheduled for the end of your billing period.
subscription.subscriptionChangesInAuditLog: Subscription changes are recorded in the Audit log.
subscription.paymentGateDescription: Your subscription has expired or a payment is required. Open the billing portal to update your payment method or renew your subscription.
subscription.pastDueDescription: Your payment is past due. Please update your payment method in the billing portal within 7 days to avoid service interruption.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.description: Manage custom roles and permissions for your organization
roles.createRoleDescription: Create a new custom role for your organization
roles.detailsDescription: View role details and manage permissions.
roles.systemRoleReadonlyNotice: This is a system default role and cannot be modified.
roles.name: Role Name
roles.noRolesDescription: Create your first role to manage access and permissions in your organization.
roles.confirmDelete: Delete this role permanently? Members assigned to it will need a new role. This cannot be undone.

org.label: Organization
org.description: Organization name, address, billing email, and general settings. Delete allows removing the organization.

members.label: Members
members.description: Organization members: list, invite, change roles, and remove members.

audit.label: Audit logs
audit.description: View activity and change history for the organization.

subscription.label: Subscription
subscription.description: View billing and subscription details. Write allows managing payment method and subscription (upgrade, cancel).

role.label: Roles
role.description: Custom roles and their permissions: create, edit, and delete roles (except locked system roles).

team.label: Teams
team.description: Teams within the organization: create, edit, delete teams and view their members.

teamMember.label: Team Members
teamMember.description: Members inside a team: view who is in a team, add and remove members from teams.

apiKeys.label: API Keys
apiKeys.description: API keys for programmatic access: create keys with selected permissions, list, and revoke keys.

teams.title: Teams
teams.name: Team Name
teams.noTeamsDescription: Create your first team to organize members and collaborate more easily.
teams.confirmDelete: Delete this team permanently? Team memberships will be removed. This cannot be undone.
teams.noMembersToAdd: No organization members available to add.
teams.noTeamMembers: No members in this team yet.
teams.confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove {{memberName}} ({{memberEmail}}) from the team?

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage organization members and their roles
members.detailsDescription: View member details and manage their role.
members.noMembersDescription: Invite teammates to join your organization and assign them roles.
Invite teammates to join your organization and assign them roles.
members.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the organization?
members.inviteDescription: Send an invitation to join this organization.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Create and manage API keys for programmatic access
apiKeys.noApiKeysDescription: Create your first API key to access your organization programmatically.
apiKeys.createDescription: API keys allow you to access the API without logging in. Store them securely.
apiKeys.name: Key name
apiKeys.keyCreated: Your API key has been created. Copy it now - you won't be able to see it again!
apiKeys.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? It will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? It will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.detailsDescription: View API key details. Deleted keys cannot be restored.
apiKeys.neverExpiresWarningBody: Non-expiring API keys are less secure. If this key is leaked, it can be used indefinitely.
apiKeys.neverExpiresConfirmLabel: I understand the risks of a non-expiring key.
apiKeys.expirationRequired: Set an expiration date or explicitly accept that this key will not expire.

upsell.upgradeDescription: This feature is available on higher plans.
upsell.rolesDescription: Create and manage custom roles with the plan that fits your team.
upsell.teamsDescription: Organize members into teams. Available on Pro and above.
upsell.membersDescription: You’ve reached your seat limit. Upgrade your plan to invite more members.
upsell.apiKeysDescription: Use API keys for programmatic access. Available on Pro and above.
upsell.auditDescription: View organization activity. Available on Basic and above.

auditLog.title: Audit Logs
auditLog.description: Review organization activity. Retention depends on your plan.
auditLog.noActiveSubscription: You don't have an active subscription. Subscribe to access audit logs.
auditLog.noLogs: No audit logs in this range
auditLog.effectiveEndOfBilling: Effective at end of billing period
